name: Peanut Powder
steps: In two 1/1 shallow gastro, roast peanuts for 15 minutes, turning every 5 minutes (in Rational) 2KG peanut in a shallow 1/1 gastro.
When cooled, using the Thermomix lid cup, add 3 cups of roasted peanuts to the Thermomix (should be below the blade).
Using a spatula, make sure to get all peanuts.
Mix thoroughly to make sure mixture is uniform.
Keep in refrigerator at all time.

notes: BE CAREFUL when blitzing, risk of turning into peanut butter.
Might needs to be blanched again.
***In Convotherm, might need to roast a further 5 minutes.
